body:
**<sub><sub>![P2 Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/P2-yellow?style=flat)</sub></sub>  Do not map RX300A to YXC**

When a user selects the new RX300A row, this `primary_backend` makes `select()` persist `avrBackend: "yamaha_yxc"`, and `AvrControlCard` will then offer the Yamaha TCP probe and auto-enable AVR control once any receiver IP/input is entered. Yamaha's own RX500A/RX300A specs list RX300A with no Wi-Fi/Ethernet or streaming support (while RX500A has them), so RX300A owners get dead network-control settings instead of being routed to `custom_command`/uncontrollable. See https://usa.yamaha.com/products/audio_visual/av_receivers_amps/rx500a/specs.html.

Useful? React with 👍 / 👎.
